metadata.name: Dies Irae
metadata.description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/pdGl7Bu.png[/img] [h2][i]First note: Overture[/i][/h2] [hr][/hr]
[i]A large-scale expansion for The Binding of Isaac: Repentance.[/i]
Dies Irae is a multi-part expansion mod introducing new characters, mechanics, enemies, music, transformations, and dozens of unlocks.
[b]This release contains the first part: Overture.[/b] The first movement of a larger vision.
More is already in development.
[h2]Characters[/h2] [b][img]https://i.imgur.com/WM8UGmU.png[/img]David[/b] A king chosen to prove his worth. To earn GodвҖҷs love, David must complete divine challenges throughout his run. Failing a challenge results in broken hearts. Choose wisely вҖ” faith is fragile.
[b][img]https://i.imgur.com/G9VGbYH.png[/img]Elijah[/b] His strength comes from his willвҖҰ but will you surrender it?
Elijah cannot pick up items in the normal way. Instead, he relies on beggars for survival.
вҖў Unique gameplay loop centered around sacrifice and reward вҖў API support included for custom Elijah beggars
[i]Note: Elijah is not compatible with modded beggars/slots by default. A simple API text file is included to help modders integrate their content.[/i]
[h2]Items & Unlocks[/h2] вҖў 33 unlockable items вҖў +1 starting unlocked item вҖў 7 new pills вҖў 4 character-unique items
Every unlock is tied to progression. Every reward must be earned.
[h2]Beggars[/h2] вҖў 7 unlockable beggars вҖў +1 starting beggar вҖў 17 Elijah-exclusive beggars
[i]Note: One beggar is not compatible with modded familiars. API support is included for modders who wish to integrate their own familiars.[/i]
[h2]Additional Content[/h2] вҖў New transformation вҖў New Flooded Caves music вҖў 2 new enemies in the Scarred Womb And more. [hr][/hr] [h2]вҡ Requirements[/h2] [b]This mod requires [url=https://repentogon.com/] REPENTOGON[/url] to function.[/b] Please install it before enabling Dies Irae. [h3]Coming in Batch II:[/h3] вҖў в§«пёҺвҷӢпёҺвҷ“пёҺв– пёҺв§«пёҺвҷҸпёҺвҷҺпёҺ рҹ‘ҺпёҺвҷӢпёҺвқ–пёҺвҷ“пёҺвҷҺпёҺ вҖў вқ„пёҺвңҢпёҺвңӢпёҺвҳ пёҺвқ„пёҺвҳңпёҺрҹ‘ҺпёҺ вҷҸпёҺв—ҸпёҺвҷ“пёҺрҹҷ°вҷӢпёҺвҷ’пёҺ вҖў вңҢпёҺв§«пёҺ в—ҸпёҺвҷҸпёҺвҷӢпёҺв¬§пёҺв§«пёҺ в–ЎпёҺв– пёҺвҷҸпёҺ в– пёҺвҷҸпёҺв¬ҘпёҺ вҷҚпёҺвҷ’пёҺвҷӢпёҺвқ’пёҺвҷӢпёҺвҷҚпёҺв§«пёҺвҷҸпёҺвқ’пёҺ рҹ•ҝпёҺрҹ–ғпёҺ в§«пёҺвҷӢпёҺвҷ“пёҺв– пёҺв§«пёҺвҷҸпёҺвҷҺпёҺ вқ–пёҺвҷӢпёҺвқ’пёҺвҷ“пёҺвҷӢпёҺв– пёҺв§«пёҺвңҶпёҺ вҖў рҹ—җпёҺрҹ“„пёҺрҹ–ғпёҺ вҷӢпёҺвҷҺпёҺвҷҺпёҺвҷ“пёҺв§«пёҺвҷ“пёҺв–ЎпёҺв– пёҺвҷӢпёҺв—ҸпёҺ в—ҶпёҺв– пёҺв—ҸпёҺв–ЎпёҺвҷҚпёҺрҹҷөв¬§пёҺ вҖў And way more! This is only the beginning. [h2]Music [/h2] Official Dies Irae playlist: [url=https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1F2VtgH5v8noJLQPmQX876?pi=LcgOcG-1RROFp] SPOTIFY[/url] [url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IX3Y6Sp9wHM] Drowning in Sorrow by JunkedLowTep[/url]
[hr][/hr] [h2]Credits[/h2] [b]Coding Team[/b] вҖў [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198208694635/] Joffe[/url] вҖў [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199030332279] Blablabla[/url] вҖў [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199099797148] Jaro7176[/url] вҖў Jam0xT вҖў Cryoxe
[b]Artist Team[/b] вҖў [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198236184134] OnXc_Kryptid[/url] вҖў [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/eschewednull] eschewednull[/url] вҖў [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199534049284] willow[/url] вҖў [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199058109437] Turtle[/url] вҖў [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198800021662] chess_mammoth[/url] вҖў Burger King
Voice Actor: MysticNuggetsв„ў
[h2]Join the Team [/h2] Want to contribute? To test new releases? вҖў Send a DM to Joffe on Discord: joffe2001 вҖў Or join the mod server: https://discord.gg/7fCM8DSeXw [h2]Bug Reports[/h2] Please report all bugs in our Discord server. We actively fix issues and improve the mod.
